title: calophyllum venulosum
intro: Calophyllum venulosum, also known as the 'Pangasinan tree', is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of calophyllic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Calophyllum venulosum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Calophyllum venulosum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by extracting the plant's bioactive compounds through various methods, such as steaming, decoction, or solvent extraction.
